title: Department Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
ITC Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
